title: mesouranema #3321
definition:
1) mid-heaven
 2) the highest point in the heavens, which the sun occupies at noon,
    where what is done can be seen and heard by all
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) mid-heaven
 2) the highest point in the heavens, which the sun occupies at noon,
    where what is done can be seen and heard by all

    NASB:  the zenith, mid-heaven:
